title: Miroring to the 4th board
excerpt:

posts.author: Ozi (Oz Israel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community,

Mirror column can be applied a limited number of times, as I understand it up to twice. You can mirror a column from board 1 to board 2 and from board 2 to board 3, but this is where the chain ends. If I have a Workflow where I am required to mirror the column to board 4, is there any workaround or solution to this? Thanks in advance,

Oz

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Ozi !

As far as I am aware, this is indeed the limitation in mirroring mirror columns.

Possibly with the release of mondayDB, this would be a limitation that would increase, without knowing for certain.

Other than that, there unfortunately is not really a workaround. You have to structure your account and implementation to take into consideration these limitations .

Sorry I cannot be of more help.

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
